untranslatable_reason: This signal requires options-specific indicators (call pricing, time decay, implied volatility, option spreads, futures contract spreads) that are not available in the price/technical indicator set. Calendar spread mechanics, strike selection, contract month premiums, and theoretical option valuation cannot be expressed using only OHLCV and standard technical indicators.
translation_notes: Signal describes a calendar spread strategy across two futures contract months (March/May) with specific option Greeks and pricing relationships. The backtest engine appears to be designed for spot/futures price action only. Entry conditions reference absolute option prices (14 points, 21 points, 7 points debit) and futures spreads (4-point premium) which require options chain data. Exit conditions marked AUTHOR_SILENT suggest position management based on unspecified criteria. Recommend: (1) enhance engine to support options data, (2) convert to synthetic equivalent using underlying futures, or (3) use specialized options backtester.
